subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted to the Beloved of all horizons! Thy letter was received, and the afflictions that have befallen thee and the loved ones of God became known [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذبه دلبر آفاق نامه شما رسید بلایای وارده بر شما و احباء الله معلوم و
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
